sglang.title: Avoid logits multimem all-gather on cross-node TP groups
sglang.author: san-tian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

disable the logits MultimemAllGatherer fast path when the TP process group spans multiple nodes
fall back to the existing normal tensor-parallel all-gather path before calling torch.distributed._symmetric_memory.rendezvous
add unit coverage for cross-node vs single-node TP group behavior

W

sglang.title: [diffusion] feat: enable compile warmup for vae decode
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR makes --enable-torch-compile cover the diffusion decode hot path without making the first live request pay compile latency.
Changes:

compile VAE decode from DecodingStage when --enable-torch-compile is enabled
use a VAE-specific default compile mode of default, with overrides via SG

sglang.title: [refactor] Add a read-through server_args accessor to RuntimeContext (stack 1/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Purely additive: RuntimeContext.server_args + get_server_args()
delegate lazily to server_args.get_global_server_args() (same idiom as
the ParallelContext wrapper: in-function import, no snapshot, no
lifecycle). Same object, same pre-publish error; all existing
call-sites untouched.
Co-Authored-By:

sglang.title: [refactor] Move ServerArgs ownership into the runtime context (stack 2/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Behavior byte-equivalent ownership flip:

RuntimeContext owns the storage slot; set_server_args() publishes
(overwrite-allowed, matching today's semantics) and reset_context()
clears it for unit-test teardown.
get_global_server_args / set_global_server_args_for_scheduler (and
the tokenizer alias) be

sglang.title: [refactor] Soft-deprecate the legacy global ServerArgs accessors + ratchet (stack 3/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Docstrings mark both shims legacy (prefer the runtime_context
accessors); a decrease-only guard test counts call-sites across srt/
(getter baseline 346, setter 5) and fails if a count grows. No runtime
DeprecationWarning: hot paths make it pure noise. Existing call-sites
are intentionally not swept

sglang.title: [refactor] Add the resolved-flags tier + resolvable-field metadata (stack 4/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Purely additive skeleton for declarative config resolution:

Flag groups are typed dataclasses (dataclass_fields is the single
source of truth; typos raise); _StaticFlags groups are writable during
resolution and locked by freeze(); each group has a transactional
test-only override(**kw) usable on f

sglang.title: [refactor] Add the declarative model-override registry and resolution gate (stack 5/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Purely additive; no production caller (the whitelist is empty, so the
gate is a no-op in the tree):

MODEL_OVERRIDES const table + @register_model_override(arch):
providers receive the pristine (server_args, model_config) read-only
and RETURN declaration dicts; collection order is const first, then

sglang.title: [refactor] Wire the config resolution pipeline (dispatch, stash, dual-apply, publish) (stack 6/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
A strict no-op while the registry is empty:

_handle_model_specific_adjustments dispatches the registry at the
head of the arch-branch section: declarations are collected on the
pristine config, stashed on the instance (computed once; the stash
travels with the object across processes), and dual-app

sglang.title: [refactor] Migrate the first override families: Mistral/Pixtral dtype, MiniMaxM2, MiMoV2 (stack 7/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
First arch families through the declarative pipeline; behavior
byte-identical via dual-apply. The unconditional-overwrite semantics
are ported faithfully; whitelist pin extends to {dtype,
enable_tf32_matmul, enable_multi_layer_eagle}. Golden diffs run the
full post_init against local mini configs (t

sglang.title: [refactor] Add predicate-keyed registration; migrate the Step3p family (stack 8/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
register_model_override_predicate covers legacy branches matched by
substring on the architecture; collection order (const -> exact ->
predicate) is pinned by test. The Step3p EAGLE and hierarchical-cache
SWA writes become declarations (whitelist + flat leaves for
swa_full_tokens_ratio / disable_hyb

sglang.title: [refactor] Sweep disable_hybrid_swa_memory writers; close the dtype family (stack 9/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Field-family sweep at zero new whitelist cost: Gemma2/Gemma3 (the whole
branch dissolves), Exaone (conditional write; the explicit-backend
assert stays), Olmo2 (write moves; attention selection stays). GptOss
mxfp4 -> dtype joins as the first model-config-derived declaration,
with the XPU dtype vali

sglang.title: [refactor] Add the post-process resolution stage; migrate sampling_backend (stack 10/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Normalization handlers become ordered declarative passes:

ResolvedView is the read-only pass input (during the dual-apply
transition it forwards to the live server_args at the legacy slot —
exactly what the imperative handler observed; end-state it overlays
accumulated declarations on the pristine

sglang.title: [refactor] Migrate the attention_backend resolution chain (stack 11/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
attention_backend enters the pipeline back-to-front, last writer first:

DLLM platform forcing (HIP/NPU/cuda-graph) — attention_backend is
whitelisted with the first mapped leaf, flags.attn.backend.
The compatibility handler's six write sites become four
slot-preserving passes (default fill via the

sglang.title: [refactor] Migrate the page_size resolution chain (stack 12/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Back-to-front: the platform/env default fill and the DLLM block-size
alignment first (the two last writers), then the compatibility
handler's eight backend page snaps as three slot-preserving passes (the
six MLA-family snaps consolidate into one pass — no attention pass sits
in that window and the c

sglang.title: [refactor] Migrate the moe_runner_backend / quantization resolution chains (stack 13/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Last writers first: the quantization-driven runner resolutions at the
head of the moe kernel handler (raises carried into the pass; the
compatibility asserts and shared-experts-fusion writes stay — that
field has load-time writers), the deprecated SGLANG_CUTLASS_MOE
override at its post-fusion slot

sglang.title: [refactor] Migrate the DeepSeek family and the parallel-request chains (stack 14/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Order-safe DeepSeek declarations: the DSA attention fill, the DSA
page-size selection (aiter preshuffle probe), and the MLA sm100
trtllm_mla fill.
The dp_size==1 resets and the A2A backend overrides become passes;
the seven identical ep_size=tp_size adjustments collapse into one
union-condition decl

sglang.title: [refactor] Rename Arg.model_overridable to Arg.resolvable (stack 15/15)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Since the post-process stage landed, the tag marks any field writable
by config resolution — model overrides and normalization passes alike
(sampling_backend and page_size are not model overrides). Mechanical
rename of the field, the derivation helper (resolvable_fields), and
all call-sites; semanti

sglang.title: [DSA][GLM5.2] Index Share for MHA
sglang.author: mattteochen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Closes #29951
Indexer is run on Layer38, Layer39 skips it.

Modifications


Skip DSA indexer on shared indexer layers.

Accuracy Tests

== aime25 ==
30 examples x 16 repeats  |  4721.4s  |  1943 tok/s  |  9.2M tokens

* pass@1[avg-of-16]  =  90.83% +/- 3.94% (SEM 0.99%)
  pass@16

sglang.title: [Fix] Fix DSA indexer fusion for NeoX RoPE
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Skip DSA indexer fusion for is_neox_style=True indexers while keeping the global fusion env enabled by default.
Use self.use_dsa_indexer_fusion as the only fusion branch guard; the module-level _use_dsa_indexer_fusion helper was removed.
Restore SGLANG_DISABLE_DSA_INDEXER_FUSION to EnvBool(

sglang.title: [diffusion] fix: shut down diffusion workers on serve exit
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add a bounded diffusion launcher shutdown helper that sends ShutdownReq to the monolithic scheduler, waits for workers to exit, then falls back to terminate/kill.
Run the cleanup when uvicorn exits, when local pool-disagg serving exits, and when a standalone disagg role is interrupted.
Stop

sglang.title: [CI] Revert ModelOpt NVFP4 threshold relax
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

restore strict B200 consistency thresholds for the ModelOpt NVFP4 diffusion cases relaxed in #29767
remove stale nvidia-*-cu12 component wheels before CUDA 13 CI installs dependencies
force-restore installed CUDA 13 NVIDIA component wheels when cuDNN files are missing after install
fail ear

sglang.title: [diffusion] fix: fix z-Image online fp8 quantization crash with dit_cpu_offload
sglang.author: ppraneth
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
sglang generate --model-path Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo --quantization fp8 crashes with TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not callable in zimage.py::get_freqs_cis. Online fp8 for Z-Image-Turbo is a documented "validated" path, so this is a regression.
Cause: the auto memory policy enables dit

sglang.title: [diffusion] perf: add unified SP shard helpers and zero-copy tail-pad attention
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Every SP (ulysses) sequence must be padded to a multiple of the SP degree before the all-to-all. The repo had four independent pad implementations with three different semantics, and two of them were wrong:

flux / flux_2 / qwen_image: pad + gap mask (correct), but three copy-pasted helpe

sglang.title: feat(parser): resolve special-token suffix at runtime for compatibility
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Some tokenizers append a shared suffix to every special token (e.g. <tool_calls:TAG> instead of <tool_calls>). The hunyuan reasoning/tool-call detectors and the --tool-call-parser auto rule hard-coded the bare literals, so both parsing and auto-detection broke on such tokenizers. Resolvin

sglang.author: whybeyoung

Fix #29878
CC @merrymercy  @hnyls2002

Latest PR Test (Extra): ❌ Run #28702923658

sglang.title: [fix] Wrap the sp_shard test entry point in sys.exit so failures propagate
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
test_sp_shard.py (added in #30107) runs a bare pytest.main(...) in its __main__ block, which swallows the exit code. The repo hygiene check test_no_bare_pytest_main now fails on main and on every open PR's merge commit:
AssertionError: ['python/sglang/multimodal_gen/test/unit/test_sp_shard.py:213']

sglang.title: [Fix] Skip cross-node probe in MultimemAllGatherer on single-node runs (fixes mooncake EP segfault)
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
test/registered/ep/test_mooncake_ep_small.py crashes the server at startup with a segmentation fault in today's scheduled run:
Current thread (most recent call first):
  File ".../torch/distributed/distributed_c10d.py", line 3068 in all_reduce
  ...
  File ".../srt/distributed/parallel_state

sglang.title: Make mem_fraction_static reserve disaggregation-mode aware
sglang.author: cctry
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When --mem-fraction-static is not set, SGLang auto-derives it by estimating reserved (non-KV) memory. Today that estimate always includes both prefill activation slack and decode/prefill CUDA-graph buffers, regardless of the node's role.
On PD-disaggregated deployments each node runs only

sglang.title: [diffusion] feat: add LingBot realtime prompt, KV window, and lazy VAE controls
sglang.author: IPostYellow
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

Add LingBot realtime support for composite prompt and camera-action inputs in a single event.
Add prompt-update handling that resets LingBot cross-attention cache only when the prompt changes.
Add optional LingBot interactive KV window control, disabled by default and enab

sglang.title: [diffusion] Refactor diffusion weight load planning
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Why
#29903 fixed the immediate online FP8 + dit_cpu_offload crash by keeping weights on device until process_weights_after_loading finished. That fix is correct for the bug, but the decision is really a load-time placement policy rather than a server-args/runtime residency policy.
This PR makes that

sglang.title: [AMD][DI][CI] 3/N Add Kimi K2.6 FP8 MI355X 1P1D nightly recipes
sglang.author: Lzy17
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add Kimi K2.6 (FP8) 2-node 1P1D disaggregation coverage to the MI355X nightly, with base + EAGLE3 MTP legs (validated end-to-end on real hardware, g09/g29).
This is intentionally minimal and additive — it does not change the common/NV path:

scripts/ci/slurm/process_result.py is untouched. I

sglang.title: [AMD] Fix RMSNorm batch-invariance on ROCm under deterministic inference
sglang.author: yuankaichen-amd
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The fused rms_norm/fused_add_rms_norm kernels used by RMSNorm.forward_hip are not batch-invariant: the per-row normalization reduction depends on batch shape, so identical rows can produce slightly different outputs in different batch compositions. Under --enable-deterministic-inference this breaks

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Structured Output][Spec Decode] Constrain bitmask and trim grammar advance at the reasoning boundary
vllm.author: yuyue0225sc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #44006.
When VLLM_ENFORCE_STRICT_TOOL_CALLING=1 is combined with MTP/EAGLE speculative
decoding, the engine intermittently rejects token 248069 (Qwen's </think>) and
the request finishes with 500 "Failed to advance FSM ... grammar rejected tokens".
There are two related defects in Stru

vllm.title: [XPU] Add W8A8 FP8 linear kernel with multi-granularity quant support
vllm.author: chaojun-zhang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR adds XPUW8A8FP8LinearKernel and XPUW8A16FP8LinearKernel for XPU,
replacing the previous XPUFP8ScaledMMLinearKernel with proper support for
multiple weight/activation quantization granularities.
Changes

Add XPUW8A8FP8LinearKernel and XPUW8A16FP8LinearKernel, replacing XPUFP8ScaledMML

vllm.title: [Misc] Preserve cross-encoder pooling extra kwargs
vllm.author: taneem-ibrahim
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Cross-encoder scoring adds compressed_token_type_ids to PoolingParams.extra_kwargs
when token type IDs are produced during preprocessing. Before this change, that assignment replaced the entire extra_kwargs dict. That could drop existing request/pooling extras such as cache_salt, mm_processo

vllm.title: [Misc] Forward request-level prompt extras for cross-encoder scoring
vllm.author: taneem-ibrahim
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Cross-encoder scoring already collected request extras like cache_salt, mm_processor_kwargs, and chat_template_kwargs, but _pre_process only used chat_template_kwargs. The engine-level extras were dropped before process_for_engine, so cross-encoder score/rerank requests did not consistently

vllm.title: [Misc] Update request-extras parity for batch chat completion
vllm.author: taneem-ibrahim
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently batch chat completions convert each conversation into a normal ChatCompletionRequest, but BatchChatCompletionRequest did not explicitly declare several compatible request extras that normal chat completions already support. This adds explicit batch request fields for:

media_io_kwa

vllm.title: [Misc] Validate Pooling cache_salt Values
vllm.author: taneem-ibrahim
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Pooling requests expose cache_salt, but unlike chat completions, completions, and responses, it does not validate that the value is a non-empty string. This adds the same validation to the shared pooling requests so embedding, classification, scoring/rerank, and generic pooling requests all

vllm.title: [CI] Bump `huggingface-hub` from `v1.10.2` to `v1.22.0`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This release includes huggingface/huggingface_hub#4394:

snapshot_download now caches a repository's file listing on disk under a new trees/ folder, so re-downloading a commit that's already cached costs a single network call — resolving the branch or tag to a commit hash — instead of one metadata r

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend][gpt-oss] Recover raw tail when Harmony parser ends non-terminal
vllm.author: yzong-rh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
co-author: @shenoyvvarun @Achyuthan-S
Purpose
Following #47062 and #46437, addresses issue #45736 for Responses API. Similar to #47061
Unlike #47061, this PR doesn't implement raw output tracking for Responses API. Instead it consolidates raw output tracking inside HarmonyParser. Additionally, upon

vllm.title: [Perf] Remove redundant op for GLM 5.2
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Part of #46654, small optimization to remove some redundant operators
All changes identical to previous implementation.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Preserve default sampling params in batch chat
vllm.author: Sunt-ing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
/v1/chat/completions/batch converts each conversation into a ChatCompletionRequest, but the conversion currently dumps Pydantic defaults too. A batch request that omits sampling params still forwards temperature=0.7, top_p=1.0, min_p=0.0, and repetition_penalty=1.0, so it silently overrides

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix Kernels and Kernels attention test failures
vllm.author: cpersson-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes failures on ROCm tests MI355 Kernels and Kernels Attention. The tests were failing due to a clone operation being attempted on the prefill_backend which was set to None for testing.
This PR also fixes a failure on the Kernels MoE test (test_ocp_mx_moe.py), which was failing due

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Model] Allow Run:ai memory_limit sentinel values
vllm.author: Sunt-ing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Follow-up to #45291. @svasilinets pointed out that Run:ai documents RUNAI_STREAMER_MEMORY_LIMIT=-1 as the unlimited/default CPU memory mode, and the same section documents 0 as the minimal CPU buffer. The validation added in #45291 currently rejects both values because it requires memory_lim

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Gemma4] Fix FA4 mm_prefix mask: add sliding window and absolute q_idx
vllm.author: lucianommartins
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #47300
Gemma4 vision models emit total gibberish on the FlashAttention-4 (CuTeDSL, SM90) backend when the context is long (>=~1k tokens past the sliding window) and contains at least one image. The Triton backend produces correct output on the same input.
Root cause — two bugs in _make

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Pooling] Forward instruction to Jina reranker scoring prompts
vllm.author: Sunt-ing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
/v1/score and /v1/rerank expose instruction for task-specific reranking, and the request model already folds it into chat_template_kwargs. The Jina reranker path builds its own prompt and did not pass that value into the existing formatter, so jinaai/jina-reranker-v3 accepted instruction req
